creator: tsally2@gmail.com
text:
A simple update to the Makefile for the new version of openssh-portable.  Also, a request to become the maintainer as this important port has gone unmaintained.

I attempted to reproduce the bug here (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/133412) but I was unsuccessful.  Will investigate further after the version upgrade.

Fix: > cat openssh-diff.txt
